bead.title: artifact renderers: media-type detail view at /artifacts/:artifactId
bead.description: Build the artifact detail route at /nodes/:nodeId/projects/:projectId/artifacts/:artifactId. Renderers by mediaType: - text/markdown: rendered markdown with syntax-highlighted code blocks; intra-repo relative links navigate within UI (same tab, no reload); external links open in new tab. - image/svg+xml with Mermaid provenance: sanitized inline SVG (DOMPurify); raw download affordance alongside. - application/vnd.excalidraw+json: read-only Excalidraw embed via hosted iframe (https://excalidraw.com/embed); raw JSON download affordance. Offline fallback: show 'Excalidraw preview requires network' with download only. - image/*: inline preview; metadata panel; open/download affordance. - application/pdf: with open-file fallback link; file size shown. - unknown/binary: metadata-only panel with open/download affordance; no attempt to render. All renderers show: path, mediaType badge, updatedAt, sidecar metadata panel (DDx frontmatter key/value). Depends on ddx-fbf57b89 (artifacts list, for navigation context).
bead.acceptance:
1. Each mediaType renders with the correct renderer (verified with one fixture artifact per type).
2. Markdown renderer: relative intra-repo links navigate within UI; external links open new tab.
3. SVG renderer: DOMPurify sanitizes content before inserting into DOM.
4. Excalidraw renderer: hosted iframe loads; offline fallback shows download-only message.
5. Unknown/binary: no render attempt; open/download affordance present.
6. All renderers show sidecar metadata panel with DDx frontmatter fields.
7. Back button from detail returns to artifacts list with filter/search state preserved.
